# Han Xudong 👋

🤖 PhD Student in Robotics @ [SUSTech](https://www.sustech.edu.cn)

> Building embodied AI systems that sense, learn, and act.

[![Google Scholar](https://img.shields.io/badge/Google%20Scholar-4285F4?logo=googlescholar&logoColor=white&style=flat-square)](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=nfoqsHMAAAAJ) [![Website](https://img.shields.io/badge/-Website-21759B?logo=wordpress&logoColor=white&style=flat-square)](https://hanxudong.cc) [![LinkedIn](https://img.shields.io/badge/LinkedIn-0077B5?logo=data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8;base64,&logoColor=white&style=flat-square)](https://www.linkedin.com/in/xudong-han) [![X](https://img.shields.io/badge/X-black?logo=x&logoColor=white&style=flat-square)](https://x.com/hanxudong159) [![Github](https://img.shields.io/badge/Github-black?logo=github&logoColor=white&style=flat-square)](https://github.com/han-xudong) [![Email](https://img.shields.io/badge/-Email-c14438?logo=Gmail&logoColor=white&style=flat-square)](mailto:12231112@mail.sustech.edu.cn) 

---

### About

Currently working on **physical intelligence and embodied AI systems**

* ✋ Physical Intelligence — vision-based deformable perception, multimodal learning
* 🧠 Embodied AI — behavior, VLA, interaction
* ⚙️ Robot Systems — sim2real, teleoperation, real-world deployment

---

### Selected Work

* **[MagiClaw](https://github.com/asMagiClaw/magiclaw)** — dual-use, vision-Based soft gripper system
* **[ProSoRo](https://github.com/ancorasir/ProSoRo)** — vision-based deformable perception of soft robots
